title: ANSWERING AFFIDAVIT OF THE FIRST RESPONDENT
deponentDescription: an adult female, South African citizen, with identity number 570807 0898 18 1, and the First Respondent in this matter.

paragraphs.text: I am an adult female, South African citizen, with identity number 570807 0898 18 1, and the First Respondent in this matter.

subs.text: I am married to the Applicant, Peter Andrew Faucitt.
I am the mother of the Second Respondent, Daniel James Faucitt.

paragraphs.text: The facts contained herein are within my personal knowledge and are both true and correct.

parts.title: THE INTERDICT IS VOID AB INITIO

paragraphs.text: The ex parte interdict granted on 19 August 2025 was obtained through material non-disclosure, perjury, fabrication of evidence, and fraud on the court.

annexures.description: Banking mandate documentation proving SOLE authority
